title: Knowledge Base AutoWiki
problem: Operational know-how stays in chats and ad-hoc docs, so institutional knowledge decays quickly and onboarding depends on finding the right person at the right time.
solution: AutoWiki converts validated conversations and documents into standardized wiki drafts with glossary links, ownership metadata, and review reminders to keep knowledge current.

impact.notes: Expected to improve self-serve answer rate and reduce repetitive internal Q&A in shared channels.
